parameters.subject: =CTR Visit Substitution — You're covering a session!
parameters.html:
=

Hi {{ $("Build Sub Calendar Patch").item.json.subName }},

You have been assigned as a substitute volunteer for an upcoming CTR visit.

Meeting link: {{ $("Build Sub Calendar Patch").item.json.meetingLink }}

Please join at the scheduled time. The director will be in touch if you have questions.

Thank you for stepping in!
CTR Team
